div.p: x86-64 System V ABI — 64 bytes (1 cache line)

g.text: Context {l regs: [usize; 6],l rsp: *mut u8,l rip: *const u8,l}

div.p: Cache Line: 64 bytes Single L1 fetch saves/restores entire context
These are assumed garbage across context switch: rax, rcx, rdx, rsi, rdi, r8-r11 Per x86-64 ABI: caller must preserve if needed
